grant_title: Community Services Funding from Csx Foundation Inc
project_area: Community services, military members, first responders
demographic_requirements: Organizations working to benefit community services, military members, or first responders in Delaware
eligibility_summary: Eligible organizations include 501(c)(3) nonprofits, government entities, and schools in Delaware addressing local needs through community services, military support, or first responder initiatives. Funding includes in-kind support such as intermodal transportation services and railroad equipment donations.
